title: 2lb Loaf Tin Liners – Pack of 100 – Non-Stick Siliconised Greaseproof Paper – 24x15x6.5cm – Perfect for Baking Bread & Cakes – Oven, Microwave, Air Fryer Safe – Halal & Kosher Certified
features: 🍞 Easy, Mess-Free Baking Bake with confidence using our pre-cut, perfectly fitted loaf tin liners. Just insert, fill, and bake — no greasing, no tearing, and no mess. Remove your cake or bread with the liner intact and your tin spotless.

🔥 Oven, Microwave, Air Fryer & Freezer Safe Made for modern kitchens. These versatile liners withstand up to 230°C, making them ideal for oven baking, air frying, microwaving, or freezing meals in advance
🧁 High-Quality Siliconised Greaseproof Paper Manufactured from premium food-grade parchment, also known as baking parchment or siliconised paper, ensuring effortless release without butter or oil.
❄️ STURDY MOULDED SHAPE – 24x15x6.5CM Designed for 2lb loaf tins. Helps keeping your tins clean. Great for Air Fryers
🕍 KOSHER & HALAL CERTIFIED A unique selling point – trusted by professionals and home bakers alike. Certified for peace of mind in any kitchen.

📦 Mega Value – 100 Liners per Pack Don’t settle for 40 – get 100 strong, shaped liners in a protective blister pack. Perfect for batch baking, commercial use, or home cooks who love convenience and value.
description: Product Description 2lb Loaf Tin Liners – Pack of 100 – Non-Stick Siliconised Greaseproof Paper for Baking Bread & Cakes Elevate your baking experience with our Pack of 100 Non-Stick Siliconised Greaseproof Paper Liners, designed for 2lb loaf tins . Crafted from premium food-grade parchment, these liners ensure effortless release without the need for butter or oil. Oven, microwave, air fryer, and freezer safe, they withstand temperatures up to 230°C, making them versatile for modern kitchens. The sturdy moulded shape maintains its structure, preventing collapsing or soggy sides during baking. Certified Kosher and Halal, these liners offer peace of mind in any kitchen. Enjoy mess-free baking with our pre-cut, perfectly fitted liners – simply insert, fill, and bake. Remove your cake or bread with the liner intact, leaving your tin spotless. Don't settle for less – get 100 strong, shaped liners in a protective blister pack, perfect for batch baking, commercial use, or home cooks who love convenience and value. 2lb Loaf Tin Liners – Pack of 100 – Non-Stick Siliconised Paper Effortlessly bake delicious loaves and cakes with our pre-cut, perfectly fitted loaf tin liners. Simply insert, fill, and bake – no greasing or mess. Oven, microwave, air fryer, and freezer safe. Made from premium food-grade parchment paper for easy release without butter or oil. Kosher and Halal certified for peace of mind. 2lb Loaf Tin Liners – Pack of 100 – Non-Stick Siliconised Greaseproof Paper for Baking Bread & Cakes Bulk Pack – Always Ready for Your Next Bake Our 2lb loaf tin liners come neatly pre-cut and stacked for your convenience. Whether you’re baking bread, cakes, or meatloaf, you’ll always have a fresh liner ready to use. Perfect for home bakers, cafés, and bakeries, this bulk pack ensures you never run out. Each liner is made from premium greaseproof, non-stick paper for effortless baking and easy clean-up. Perfect for Air Fryers & Compact Ovens Our 2lb loaf tin liners aren’t just for traditional baking — they’re ideal for use in air fryers too. Designed to withstand high temperatures, these liners make cooking quick breads, cakes, and other recipes in your air fryer effortless. Enjoy mess-free cooking with easy removal and no scrubbing required. The Perfect Fit for Every Bake Designed specifically for 2lb loaf tins, our liners provide a flawless fit every time. Whether you’re baking bread, cakes, or savoury loaves, these greaseproof, non-stick silicone-coated liners ensure easy release and perfect presentation. Certified Kosher and Halal , and made PFAS-free for safe, baking.
